title: cymbidium clypeolum
intro: Cymbidium clypeolum, commonly known as the yellow helmet orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Asia and Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cymbidium clypeolum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
